Off Calendar Dec-16-2022 Off Calendar

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to January 10, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2022 Continued To Oct-11-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No Appearance. Plaintiff's Counsel Roland Christensen, ESQ. is sanction $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC has been cont'd to OCT-11-2022. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-17-2022 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-16-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Apr-04-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Attys. ROLAND CHRISTENSEN, Esq. and SAMANTHA DEMURREN, Esq. of Arnold & Itkin, LLP (Tel: 801-400-0642) for plaintiff Israel Preswich (via Zoom videoconference);
Atty. SPENCER H. KELLY, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois (Tel: 415-438-5928) for defendant Lyft, Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LYFT, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss For Forum Non Conveniens.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Lyft, Inc.'s "motion to dismiss for forum non conveniens" is granted. Plaintiff is a Utah resident alleging injuries from a motor vehicle accident in Utah involving another Utah resident's vehicle. Witnesses, evidence and other sources of proof related to the accident are also in Utah, and Lyft states willingness to be sued in Utah. (See Stangvik v. Shiley Inc. (1991) 54 Cal.3d 744.) Plaintiff's belated opposition does not contest that Utah is a suitable forum. (Id. at 3:9-10.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
